name: Alibaba Cloud ACK MCP Server
what_it_does: Official Alibaba Cloud ACK (Container Service for Kubernetes) MCP server enabling AI agents to manage Kubernetes clusters on Alibaba Cloud — creating and scaling node pools, deploying applications, monitoring cluster health, and integrating ACK's managed Kubernetes service into agent-driven cloud infrastructure workflows.
use_cases: Managing ACK Kubernetes clusters from cloud infrastructure agents
Scaling node pools and worker nodes from capacity management agents
Deploying and managing containerized applications from DevOps agents
Monitoring cluster health and resource utilization from operations agents
Creating and configuring new ACK clusters from provisioning agents
Managing namespaces and workloads from Kubernetes admin agents
not_for: Teams not using Alibaba Cloud (use EKS, GKE, or AKS MCPs instead)
best_when: A team runs workloads on Alibaba Cloud ACK and wants AI-assisted Kubernetes management — automating cluster operations and deployments on Alibaba's managed K8s service.
avoid_when: You use AWS EKS, Google GKE, or Azure AKS — use their respective MCPs.

auth.notes: Alibaba Cloud AccessKey ID and AccessKey Secret required. Configure with minimum required RAM permissions for K8s operations.

pricing.free_tier_limits: None — Alibaba Cloud ACK is a paid service
pricing.paid_tiers: ACK: variable pricing by node count and region
pricing.notes: ACK is a paid Alibaba Cloud service. Official MCP is free. Cluster compute costs apply.

performance.rate_limits: Alibaba Cloud API: rate limits per account tier

known_agent_gotchas: Alibaba Cloud account required — signup process can be slow for non-Chinese users
AccessKey permissions must be configured carefully — use RAM policies
Cluster operations affect production infrastructure — use staging environment first
Official MCP from aliyun GitHub org — well-maintained
Primary documentation in Chinese — English docs may be incomplete
Billing starts immediately on cluster creation — agents should confirm before creating
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. AccessKey is powerful — use RAM policies for least privilege. Official Alibaba Cloud MCP. Cluster operations affect production. Data may reside in China.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS. RAM policy scoping. Official MCP. Production infrastructure. China data residency possible.
